## What changed

Briefly describe the change and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] make test and make lint pass locally.
- [ ] Added or updated a test for any behavior change.
- [ ] Numbers stay consistent across README, paper, tables, and results artifacts.
- [ ] Heavy deps (torch, transformers, diffusers, CLIP) stay imported inside the functions that use
      them, not at module top.
- [ ] No reported number comes from a non-reproducible path.
- [ ] Did not weaken the integrity rails (floors, shuffled-label control, probe-collapse diagnostic).

## Notes for the reviewer

Anything worth calling out: trade-offs, follow-ups, or known limitations.
